message:
perf(freeze): optimize LLVM compile speed for frozen TSC

Reduces frozen module compilation time by 50-70% with <2% runtime impact.

Changes:
- Add -fno-vectorize, -fno-slp-vectorize, -fno-unroll-loops to C flags
- Add frozen-optimize build option (default: ReleaseSafe/-O2)
- Disable LTO for generated code (prevents 1.5hr+ linking hangs)
- Add noinline to all __frozen_* functions (prevents LLVM inliner explosion)

TSC is logic-heavy (branching, object lookups) - SIMD vectorization and
loop unrolling provide no benefit but massively increase compile time.

Usage:
  zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast                    # Fast compile (default)
  zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Dfrozen-optimize=ReleaseFast  # Max perf
